Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReference

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control a SpatialReference.

[Guid("4434D680-F4DA-11D1-BCA6-0000F875BCCE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialReference : ISpatialReferenceInfo

PrecisionExImpl

An opaque reference to the precision information (including z/m awareness) implementation for this spatial reference.

long PrecisionExImpl { get; }

long
